SEARCH
Package com.berryrock.integrationhub.service

Class AddressSyncService

java.lang.Object
com.berryrock.integrationhub.service.AddressSyncService
@Service public class AddressSyncService extends Object
API-triggered address synchronization service. Part of the service layer — implements the on-demand sync path exposed via the REST endpoint POST /api/v1/workflows/address-sync/run. Unlike the startup pipeline, this service supports dry-run mode, optional CSV input in place of the live Google Sheet, and selective Buildium enrichment via the AddressSyncRequest flags. Address matching uses a two-pass strategy: a full normalized key match first, followed by an address-line-only fallback for records where city, state, or ZIP differs between systems. Duplicate keys within any data set are surfaced as warnings in the returned AddressSyncSummary.

  • Constructor Details

    • AddressSyncService

      public AddressSyncService(SalesforceClient salesforceClient, GoogleSheetsClient googleSheetsClient, BuildiumClient buildiumClient, AuditLogService auditLogService, AddressNormalizer addressNormalizer, AddressMatcher addressMatcher)
      Constructs the sync service with all required integration clients and helpers.
      Parameters:
      salesforceClient - client for fetching Opportunity records from Salesforce
      googleSheetsClient - client for reading and writing the Loan Tape Google Sheet
      buildiumClient - client for fetching active-lease address records from Buildium
      auditLogService - service for logging workflow lifecycle events
      addressNormalizer - utility for normalizing and keying address strings
      addressMatcher - utility for grouping records into normalized-address lookup maps

  • Method Details

    • runSync

      public AddressSyncSummary runSync(AddressSyncRequest request)
      Executes the full sync workflow for the given request configuration. Fetches records from Salesforce, Google Sheets (or a local CSV), and optionally Buildium; normalizes addresses; classifies Salesforce record quality; builds lookup maps; performs two-pass matching; and optionally writes results back to Google Sheets.
      Parameters:
      request - the sync configuration, including dry-run flag, sheet overrides, and optional CSV path
      Returns:
      a summary containing record counts and any warnings generated during the run

    • run

      public AddressSyncSummary run(AddressSyncRequest request)
      Delegates to runSync(AddressSyncRequest). Provided as a convenience alias for callers that prefer the shorter method name.
      Parameters:
      request - the sync configuration
      Returns:
      the sync result summary
